name: AI & ML
description: Products for model workflows, prompts, embeddings, evaluation, and applied AI tooling.
intro: Use this archive to publish product pages that target applied AI terms while keeping the underlying content model simple enough for version-controlled JSON.

name: Developer Tools
description: SDKs, APIs, dev workflow products, and utilities for builders.
intro: This template makes developer-tool pages feel editorial rather than autogenerated. Archive copy, cards, and detail pages share a consistent structure out of the box.

name: Data & Analytics
description: Analytics platforms, warehouse tooling, observability, and reporting products.
intro: Data categories benefit from clear filtering and structured detail pages. This layout leaves room for benchmarks, integrations, and trust-building product detail content.

name: Integration & Automation
description: Workflow engines, connectors, orchestration tools, and automation products.
intro: Automation landing pages need dense internal linking. The extracted card grid and related-item sections are meant to support that without adding backend complexity.
